languages.text: {n}Приземистый мужчина, с почти утопленной в широких плечах шеей, не спеша складывает аквилу на груди.{/n} "Уже видались, вашество. Извините, что сразу не пустил — работа такая".

traits.locale_text: {n}Приземистый мужчина, с почти утопленной в широких плечах шеей, не спеша складывает аквилу на груди.{/n} "Уже видались, вашество. Извините, что сразу не пустил — работа такая".

languages.text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."
languages.original_text: {n}Приземистый мужчина, с почти утопленной в широких плечах шеей, не спеша складывает аквилу на груди.{/n} "Уже видались, вашество. Извините, что сразу не пустил — работа такая".

traits.locale_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

{n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

{n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

languages.text: {n}那个矮壮男人的脖子几乎陷进了宽阔的肩膀里，他漫不经心地在胸前做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}“又见面了，大人。抱歉没直接放您进去，毕竟这是我的职责。”
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}那个矮壮男人的脖子几乎陷进了宽阔的肩膀里，他漫不经心地在胸前做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}“又见面了，大人。抱歉没直接放您进去，毕竟这是我的职责。”

languages.text: {n}L'homme trapu, dont le cou disparaît presque complètement entre ses larges épaules, fait paresseusement le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Comme on se retrouve, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Je m'excuse de vous avoir {mf|retenu|retenue} à l'entrée, mais ça fait partie de mon boulot. »
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'homme trapu, dont le cou disparaît presque complètement entre ses larges épaules, fait paresseusement le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Comme on se retrouve, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Je m'excuse de vous avoir {mf|retenu|retenue} à l'entrée, mais ça fait partie de mon boulot. »

languages.text: {n}Boynu neredeyse geniş omuzlarına gömülmüş olan bodur adam, tembelce göğsünün önünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n} "Yine karşılaştık {mf|lordum|leydim}. Sizi hemen içeri almadığım için üzgünüm. Sadece işimi yaptım."
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}Boynu neredeyse geniş omuzlarına gömülmüş olan bodur adam, tembelce göğsünün önünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n} "Yine karşılaştık {mf|lordum|leydim}. Sizi hemen içeri almadığım için üzgünüm. Sadece işimi yaptım."

languages.text: {n}El hombre achaparrado, con el cuello prácticamente hundido entre sus anchos hombros, hace vagamente el signo del Aquila frente a su pecho.{/n} «Volvemos a vernos, mi {mf|señor|señora}. Disculpe por no permitirle entrar de inmediato; es mi trabajo».
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre achaparrado, con el cuello prácticamente hundido entre sus anchos hombros, hace vagamente el signo del Aquila frente a su pecho.{/n} «Volvemos a vernos, mi {mf|señor|señora}. Disculpe por no permitirle entrar de inmediato; es mi trabajo».

languages.text: {n}Der untersetzte Mann, dessen Hals in seine breiten Schultern gesunken zu sein scheint, macht vor seiner Brust gemächlich das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n} "So sieht man sich wieder {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Tut mir leid, dass ich Euch nicht gleich reingelassen habe ... das ist mein Job."
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der untersetzte Mann, dessen Hals in seine breiten Schultern gesunken zu sein scheint, macht vor seiner Brust gemächlich das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n} "So sieht man sich wieder {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Tut mir leid, dass ich Euch nicht gleich reingelassen habe ... das ist mein Job."

languages.text: {n}首が肩に埋もれそうな、低い体格の男。胸の前でアグリラの印を怠惰に描いている。{/n}「またお会いしましょう、{mf|殿|女殿}。すぐに中に入れなかったことをお詫びいたします。それは私の仕事です。」
languages.original_text: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."

traits.locale_text: {n}首が肩に埋もれそうな、低い体格の男。胸の前でアグリラの印を怠惰に描いている。{/n}「またお会いしましょう、{mf|殿|女殿}。すぐに中に入れなかったことをお詫びいたします。それは私の仕事です。」
